statement: Leakage control is verified (causal/day-local features, fit-only normalization, disjoint early-stopping tail, day-aligned period boundaries).
A within-day label-shuffle and a time-reversed sentinel collapse the same-row delta toward zero, an empirical leakage negative control.
The frozen primary candidate met the predeclared official validation-readout criteria (validation-only evidence).
The predeclared TCN primary candidate met the guarded stability criteria in a historically-contacted walk-forward readout.
All four model families exceeded the same-row dummy baseline on mean macro-F1 in the guarded readout.
LightGBM had the numerically highest mean delta; the route selects no winning model.
The guarded walk-forward evidence is historically-contacted and must not be treated as an unseen-data result.

The edge is concentrated in low-activity (low-movement) bars and is below the balanced random prior on the highest-activity bars; 'activity' is a per-day eligible-row-count proxy (a no-trade-band proxy), not realized volume or liquidity.
Evaluation is classification-only; no economic (P&L / cost / Sharpe) analysis is performed or claimed. A small macro-F1 delta is not evidence of tradeability.
Stability rests on 2 seeds, which is thin for seed-to-seed variance; the primary uncertainty estimate is a per-trading-day block bootstrap.
The V1 route historically contacted the post-2017 segment, so the walk-forward readout is guarded and historically-contacted, not an unseen-data result.
